interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame and also received awards?
interactions.intention: Find the names of players inducted into the Hall of Fame who also received awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON H.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.utterance: How many ballots were cast for these players?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON H.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND S.YEAR = 1985

interactions.utterance: How many votes were needed for players to be inducted into the hall of fame?
interactions.intention: Find the number of votes needed for players to be inducted into the hall of fame.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide me the details of players who won awards and their corresponding votes?
interactions.intention: Get details of players who won awards and their corresponding votes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.PLAYER_ID, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.AWARD_ID, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.YEAR, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.LEAGUE_ID, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.POINTS_WON, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.POINTS_MAX, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.VOTES_FIRST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE ON THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.AWARD_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.AWARD_ID AND THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.YEAR = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.YEAR AND THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.LEAGUE_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.LEAGUE_ID AND THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.PLAYER_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.PLAYER_ID

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.PLAYER_ID, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.AWARD_ID, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.YEAR, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.LEAGUE_ID, THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY ON THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.YEAR = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY.YEAR AND THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.LEAGUE_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY.LEAGUE_ID AND THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.PLAYER_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY.PLAYER_ID WHERE THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.LEAGUE_ID = 'NL'

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, S.SALARY, A.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND A.YEAR = S.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players received the highest salary in the same year they won an award?
interactions.intention: Find the players who received the highest salary in the same year they won an award.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, MAX(S.SALARY) AS HIGHEST_SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND A.YEAR = S.YEAR GROUP BY P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Out of those players, who had their salary recorded and what were their salaries?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of players inducted into the Hall of Fame and received votes for player awards who also had their salary recorded.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT SAL.PLAYER_ID, SAL.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE VOTE ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = VOTE.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SAL ON SAL.PLAYER_ID = HOF.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those players with recorded salaries, which ones earned the highest salary?
interactions.intention: Find the player with the highest salary among those inducted into the Hall of Fame, received votes for player awards, and had their salary recorded.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SAL.PLAYER_ID, MAX(SAL.SALARY) AS MAX_SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE VOTE ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = VOTE.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SAL ON SAL.PLAYER_ID = HOF.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y' GROUP BY SAL.PLAYER_ID ORDER BY MAX_SALARY DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.intention: Find the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT H.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON H.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND H.YEARID = S.YEAR

interactions.intention: Find out the salaries of players who received awards in 1985.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON PA.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND PA.YEAR = S.YEAR AND PA.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID WHERE PA.YEAR = 1985

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT YEARID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' GROUP BY YEARID ORDER BY COUNT(PLAYER_ID) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: In that year, who was inducted with the highest number of votes?
interactions.intention: Find the player with the highest number of votes inducted into the Hall of Fame in the previously mentioned year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' AND YEARID = (SELECT YEARID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' GROUP BY YEARID ORDER BY COUNT(PLAYER_ID) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) ORDER BY VOTES DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.utterance: What is the full name and birth country of that player?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the full name and birth country of the player mentioned earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, BIRTH_COUNTRY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE PLAYER_ID = (SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' AND YEARID = (SELECT YEARID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' GROUP BY YEARID ORDER BY COUNT(PLAYER_ID) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) ORDER BY VOTES DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total points won by players who received awards in the same year?
interactions.intention: Find the total points won by players who received awards in the same year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE ON THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.AWARD_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.AWARD_ID AND THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.YEAR = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What about the average salary of players who received awards?
interactions.intention: Find the average salary of players who received awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(SALARY) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY ON THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD.PLAYER_ID = THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the highest salary from those?
interactions.intention: Find the highest salary among players who received awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(SALARY) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the number of votes players received to be inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the number of votes players received for Hall of Fame induction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which awards did the players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame win, and in what years?
interactions.intention: Find the awards won by players inducted into the Hall of Fame and the years they won.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, PA.AWARD_ID, PA.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the highest number of ballots cast for any player inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the highest number of ballots cast for any player inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(BALLOTS) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players have won awards and what were their salaries in the same year?
interactions.intention: Find players who have won awards and their salaries in the same year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT A.PLAYER_ID, A.AWARD_ID, A.YEAR, A.LEAGUE_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON A.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND A.YEAR = S.YEAR AND A.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the heaviest weight recorded among the players?
interactions.intention: Find the heaviest weight recorded among players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(WEIGHT) AS HEAVIEST_WEIGHT FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who are the players with the heaviest weight and what awards have they received?
interactions.intention: Identify the players with the heaviest weight and the awards they have received.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.WEIGHT, A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.WEIGHT = (SELECT MAX(WEIGHT) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total points won for each award by year?
interactions.intention: Summarize the total points won for each award by year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AWARD_ID, YEAR, SUM(POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE GROUP BY AWARD_ID, YEAR;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were the total points won for awards in a specific year, say 2020?
interactions.intention: Provide the total points won for awards in the year 2020.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AWARD_ID, YEAR, SUM(POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE WHERE YEAR = 2020 GROUP BY AWARD_ID, YEAR;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the data sorted by the year in ascending order?
interactions.intention: Show the total points won for each award by year, sorted in ascending order of the year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AWARD_ID, YEAR, SUM(POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE GROUP BY AWARD_ID, YEAR ORDER BY YEAR ASC;

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the average salary for each team?
interactions.intention: Find the average salary grouped by each team.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.team_id, AVG(TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.salary) AS avg_salary FROM TheHistoryofBaseball_salary GROUP BY TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.team_id

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which team has the highest average salary?
interactions.intention: Identify the team with the highest average salary.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.team_id, AVG(TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.salary) AS avg_salary FROM TheHistoryofBaseball_salary GROUP BY TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.team_id ORDER BY avg_salary DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: And which team has the lowest average salary?
interactions.intention: Find the team with the lowest average salary.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.team_id, AVG(TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.salary) AS avg_salary FROM TheHistoryofBaseball_salary GROUP BY TheHistoryofBaseball_salary.team_id ORDER BY avg_salary ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
